ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the application */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* User's fitness level (beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* User's height in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* User's weight in pounds or kilograms */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* User's activity level (sedentary, lightly active, moderately active, very active, extremely active) */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* User's birthday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Average calorie burn rate for each activity type */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of each activity type (beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who administers the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (public, private, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group, if applicable */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in miles */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to track the activity */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES activity_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Fitbit, Apple Watch) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., wearable, smartphone) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was connected to the application */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-group association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the group (admin, member, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES activity_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who the plan is for */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fitness plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fitness plan */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the fitness plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fitness plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (active, completed, paused) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (custom, pre-built) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "earn_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (badge, points, achievement) */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
